name: WEED, INC.
business: WEED, Inc. is a multi-national bio-pharmaceutical and real estate holding company focused on the development and application of cannabis-derived compounds for medical and industrial use. It owns a proprietary seedbank of over 250 cannabis and hemp strains and real estate assets such as the Four Winds of Lake Erie property. The company has no current revenue and requires substantial funding to continue its research and development activities.

exposures.sentence: WEED, Inc. is a multi-national bio-pharmaceutical and real estate holding company.
In December 2025, the Company entered into a strategic partnership with Remergify, Inc. to evaluate the development of a digital asset ecosystem.

During fiscal 2025, the Company focused on asset preservation and the modernization of its business model, which included streamlining international operations and exploring the integration of blockchain and AI technologies within the regulated cannabis ecosystem.
